name: mycobrain-control
description: MycoBrain IoT sensor platform control via MDP protocol. Provides tools for sensor reading, Nemo claw gripper control, output management, and drone mission commands.
author: Mycosoft Labs

tools.name: sensor_read
tools.description: Read BME688 environmental sensor data (temperature, humidity, pressure, IAQ, CO2, VOC) from both ambient and environment slots.

tools.name: claw_grip
tools.description: Close the Nemo claw gripper (MicoLatch payload latch).

tools.name: claw_release
tools.description: Open the Nemo claw gripper (release payload).

tools.name: claw_position
tools.description: Set the Nemo claw servo to a specific angle.

tools.name: claw_status
tools.description: Get current Nemo claw position, closed state, force feedback, and mode.

id.description: Output ID: mosfet1, mosfet2, mosfet3, buzzer, or neopixel

tools.name: buzzer
tools.description: Play a tone on the buzzer.

tools.name: device_status
tools.description: Get full device health status including sensor presence, uptime, and capabilities.

tools.name: lora_send
tools.description: Send a LoRa message via SX1262 radio.

tools.name: drone_mission
tools.description: Start a MycoDRONE mission (deploy, retrieve, or data mule).

type.description: Mission type: deploy, retrieve, data_mule, rtl, land

target_device_id.description: Target device ID for retrieve/data_mule missions
